The test has stopped or could not start because the vehicle is moving or a vehicle speed sensor fault code is active. Correct the issue, key off, allow the ECM to completely power down, key ON, and restart the test.
def_system: DEF system is frozen. Thaw system, key OFF, allow the ECM to completely power down, key ON, and restart the test.
DEF tank level is too low. Fill tank with DEF, key OFF, allow the ECM to completely power down, key ON, and restart the test.
Failed. The DEF (Reductant) tank temperature is reading higher than the allowable limit. The test is disabled to protect the system from overheating. Allow the tank to cool before retrying this text.
Failed. The test cannot run because the DEF (Reductant) in the tank may be frozen or is too cold to dose.  Please allow the truck to run until tank has thawed and restart test.
Low Tank Level, please fill DEF (Reductant) tank and then restart test.
The ECM detected no flow of the DEF from the tank.  Please check for leaks or restrictions within the system.
The status of the engine out NOx sensors is continuously invalid. Correct the issue, key OFF, allow the ECM to completely power down, key ON, and restart the test.
The test has stopped because the engine out NOx levels could not be modulated to the desired range. Correct the issue, key OFF, allow the ECM to completely power down, key ON, and restart the test.
The test has stopped due to DEF dosing being disabled. Correct the issue, key OFF, allow the ECM to completely power down, key ON, and restart the test.

The test has stopped or could not be started because the ECM is unable to dose DEF, DEF is frozen or DEF Tank Low. Correct the issue, key OFF, allow the ECM to completely power down, key ON, and restart the test.

The service regeneration is not enabled by calibration.
The service regeneration runs at the moment.
The service regeneration was done completely and a reduced soot load is confirmed by measurement
The service regeneration was done completely.
The test has stopped because the DPF outlet temperature is out of the desired range. Correct the issue, key OFF, allow the ECM to completely power down, key ON, and restart the test.

The test has stopped because engine speed is out of the desired range. Correct the issue, key OFF, allow the ECM to completely power down, key ON, and restart the test.
The test has stopped because of a Mass Air Flow (MAF) Sensor issue. Check for pending/active faults, correct the issue, key OFF, allow the ECM to completely power down, key ON, and restart the test.
The test has stopped because the barometric air pressure or ambient air temperature is low. Correct the issue, key OFF, allow the ECM to completely power down, key ON, and restart the test.
The test has stopped because the exhaust flow rate is out of range. Correct the issue, key OFF, allow the ECM to completely power down, key ON, and restart the test.

The test has stopped due to an HC dosing error. Correct the issue, key OFF, allow the ECM to completely power down, key ON, and restart the test.
The test has stopped or could not be started because of a ANR error. Key OFF, allow the ECM to completely power down, key ON, and restart the test.
The test has stopped or could not be started because of a temperature error. Key OFF, allow the ECM to completely power down, key ON, and restart the test.

The test has stopped or could not be started because the status of the Exhaust Gas Temperature Sensor 1/4 is continually invalid. Correct the issue, key OFF, allow the ECM to completely power down, key ON, and restart the test.

The test has stopped or could not start because an engine brake disable request was received on the data link. Correct the issue, key OFF, allow the ECM to completely power down, key ON, and restart the test.
The test has stopped or could not start because another feature is controlling the engine speed. Correct the issue, key OFF, allow the ECM to completely power down, key ON, and restart the test.
The test has stopped or could not start because another feature is controlling the engine speed. Troubleshoot other active faults that led to engine derate first.
The test has stopped or could not start because of an EGR or turbocharger issue. Correct the issue, key OFF, allow the ECM to completely power down, key ON, and restart the test.
The test has stopped or could not start because one or more pressure/temperature sensors is outside the allowable threshold.
The test has stopped or could not start because the (PTO) or Remote PTO is engaged. Correct the issue, key OFF, allow the ECM to completely power down, key ON, and restart the test.

The test has stopped or could not start because the accelerator pedal or throttle position is depressed. Correct the issue, key OFF, allow the ECM to completely power down, key ON, and restart the test.

The test has stopped or could not start because the brake pedal is depressed. Check the vehicle brake switch and the circuit, correct the issue, key OFF, allow the ECM to completely power down, key ON, and restart the test.
The test has stopped or could not start because the parking brake is not engaged. Exit the test, correct the issue and restart the test.
The test has stopped or could not start.  Correct the issue, key OFF, allow the ECM to completely power down, key ON, and restart the test.
